steps.title: Identify the relative clause structure
steps.content: The relative clause starts with that and already contains a main verb: traces. The blank is positioned between commas, signaling that it should contain a modifying phrase rather than a second main verb.

steps.title: Match the verb form to the structure
steps.content: integrating is a present participle that describes how the resource traces history. Additional verbal ideas in a clause can only be expressed through non-finite forms like participles. Finite verbs (A, B, D) would place two main verbs in the clause without a coordinating conjunction. That matches choice C — C is correct.
